ConstantQuality.Desc: Make quality depend on day planted rather than current day.
RandomQuality.Desc: Make quality depend on a random variable rather than current day. Constant Quality must be selected as well.
ResetConstantForRegrow.Desc: For constant quality, reset the variable for regrowable crops.
QualityModifier.Desc: Multiple for chance of gold and silver qualities.
IridiumChanceFertilized.Desc: Chance for iridium harvest when using Deluxe Fertilizer, as a fraction of gold harvest chance.
IridiumChance.Desc: Chance for iridium harvest when not using Deluxe Fertilizer, as a fraction of gold harvest chance.
